name: 17q12_RCAD_HNF1B
description: 17q12 recurrent ~1.4 Mb microdeletion/microduplication region (RCAD syndrome: renal cysts and diabetes; HNF1B locus). Flanked by directly oriented SDs mediating NAHR.

architecture.internal_structure: Flanking SD blocks of ~80-100 kb at >99% identity; unique core contains HNF1B, ACACA, LHX1, AATF, ZNHIT3.

related_diseases: Renal cysts and diabetes syndrome (RCAD, MODY5)
